Caro cards themselves aren't the problem rather than just learning to balance their health and making sure to use the furnace in a way to keep yourself alive they have the red bar called embryo bar once that gets full it puts an embryo in your hand that retains that can either be used or devoured when a caro awaker uses their exalt (ultimate)

To have the embryo get devoured just have it in your hand when you use the caro awaker's exalt and to use it just play it like you would any normal card, using it gives one specific awaker 30 aliemus (exalt charge) and 10% crit rate for the turn
The furnace i mentioned is the red orb next to the embryo bar that fills up at the end of the battle or at the end of the turn if you have chaos awakers in your team mixed with caro characters
Caro itself is much simpler than ultra just that you have to remember to manage your hp
Hameln is good no matter what realm you play should definitely get him

What does realm mastery means ? Increasing the stats of the selected realm ? For example if im using Chaos the embryo fusion will be increased ?
Or for the aqua the tentacle dmg will be increased ?

Chaos: use posse => aoe aliemus charge 
Aequor: more chance for more tentacle to attack. The tentacle assembly things.
Caro: First Devour will have beefy shield and more temporary strenght
Ultra: more chance for inspiration (the give 1 athri draw 1 card thing) each turn

You can see what this stat does by tapping/clicking it
